title: (Bearish Signal) VUZI enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Apr 05, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that VUZI's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 91 similar cases where VUZI's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 79 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $28.46 crossed the support line at $24.49 and is trading between $30.69 resistance and $24.49 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/03/21 - 04/05/21, the price experienced a +38% Uptrend. During the week of 03/26/21 - 04/05/21, the stock enjoyed a +22% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/3rbobibgklr61.png?width=1520&format=png&auto=webp&s=aaeb498202e1fdaa537221cded420b2d500bb77c

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for VUZI moved out of overbought territory on March 22, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 34 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 29 of the 34 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 85%.

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 43 of 51 cases where VUZI's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 84%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where VUZI declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

VUZI broke above its upper Bollinger Band on March 19, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10427822-vuzix-vuzi-27-94-enters-downtrend-as-momentum-indicator-drops-below-0-level-on-apr-05-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=blog)
